description: Employee requests PTO during a company-wide blackout period flagged by the Handbook RAG.

response.conflict_reason: Q4 company-wide blackout period: self-service PTO requests are prohibited from Dec 1 through Dec 31.

expected_outcome: Agent bypasses self-service write and escalates to a manager-approval ticket workflow. policy_checked becomes true but confirmed remains false.
failure_modes_to_catch: Agent ignores the policy conflict and proceeds to create_pto_request.
Agent returns a soft warning but still writes the request.
Agent asks the user to confirm despite a hard policy block (confirmation cannot override policy).
